question: How is Data Cloud leveraged by the Answer Questions with Knowledge action in Agentforce?
options: Data Cloud stores and manages the indexed Knowledge articles.
Data Cloud is not required; the articles can be accessed directly from the CRM by the agent.
Data Cloud provides the real-time data streams that update the Knowledge articles.
explanation: Data Cloud se usa para almacenar y gestionar artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente usa para respuestas fundamentadas; es el repositorio de contenido de Knowledge.

question: Universal Containers needs to create a prompt template that provides a detailed product description based on the latest product data. The description will be used in marketing materials to ensure consistency and accuracy. Which prompt template type should UC use?
options: Record Summary
Sales Email
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo correcto para generar una descripcion de producto detallada que se almacene en un campo especifico del registro. Permite generar contenido de IA para un campo individual con revision humana, ideal para garantizar consistencia y precision en materiales de marketing.

question: Universal Containers needs its sales reps to be able to only execute prompt templates, not create or manage them. Which permission set should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager permission set.
Prompt Template User permission set.
Einstein Generative AI User permission set.
explanation: Prompt Template User es el permission set que permite unicamente ejecutar prompt templates existentes, sin capacidad de crear ni administrar nuevos templates. Es la opcion correcta cuando solo se necesita acceso de ejecucion.

question: Universal Containers (UC) configured a new PDF file ingestion in Data Cloud with all the required fields, and also created the mapping and the search index. UC is now setting up the retriever and notices a required field is missing. How should UC resolve this?
options: Update the search index to include the desired field.
Modify the retriever's configuration to include the desired field.
Create a new custom Data Cloud object that includes the desired field.
explanation: Para agregar un campo faltante al retriever, se debe modificar la configuracion del retriever para incluir el campo deseado. El retriever necesita que el campo este referenciado directamente en su configuracion para poder usarlo en las busquedas.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements. Which prompt template type should UC use, and what additional configuration is required?
options: Sales Email, and that the object is associated with a campaign.
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled.
Record Summary, and that the Lightning page is updated to Dynamic Forms.
explanation: Para poblar un campo con output generado por IA, se debe usar Field Generation como tipo de template, y ademas habilitar Dynamic Forms en la pagina Lightning donde reside el campo. Sin Dynamic Forms, el icono de generacion de campo (sparkle icon) no aparecera.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to save agents time with AI-generated case summaries. UC has implemented the Work Summary feature. What does Einstein consider when generating a summary?
options: Generation is grounded with conversation context, Knowledge articles, and cases.
Generation is grounded with existing conversation context only.
Generation is grounded with conversation context and Knowledge articles.
explanation: Einstein Work Summary genera el resumen usando como grounding el contexto de la conversacion actual y los articulos de Knowledge relevantes. No incluye otros casos historicos en el grounding; se centra en la conversacion actual enriquecida con el Knowledge disponible.

question: Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative AI capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information. What is the most likely root cause?
options: The LLM model selected is not compatible with case summarization.
The prompt template has not been activated in production.
The data being used for grounding is incorrect or incomplete.
explanation: Cuando los resumenes generados no devuelven la informacion apropiada, la causa mas probable es que los datos de grounding sean incorrectos o incompletos. El LLM genera respuestas basadas en el contexto proporcionado; si el grounding falla, las respuestas no seran precisas.

question: Which object stores the conversation transcript between the customer and the agent?
options: Case
Messaging End User
Messaging Session
explanation: Messaging Session guarda la transcripción de la conversación.

question: Universal Containers has implemented an agent that answers questions based on Knowledge articles. Which topic and action combination should be used?
options: Service Support topic and Retrieve Knowledge Action.
General FAQ topic and Answers Questions with Knowledge Action.
Knowledge Management topic and Search Knowledge Action.
explanation: La combinacion correcta es un topic de General FAQ con la accion Answer Questions with Knowledge. Esta accion estandar de Agentforce esta disenada especificamente para responder preguntas usando articulos de Knowledge indexados.

question: When configuring a prompt template, an Agentforce Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response. What does this mean?
options: It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows the raw prompt sent to the LLM and the model's response separately.
It indicates an error in the template configuration that needs to be resolved.
explanation: Al previsualizar un prompt template, los dos outputs (Resolution y Response) muestran la respuesta del LLM basada en el registro de muestra seleccionado. Resolution es el resultado procesado y Response es la salida directa del modelo.

question: Universal Containers wants to utilize Agentforce for Sales to help sales reps reach their sales quotas by providing AI-generated plans containing guidance and steps for closing deals. Which feature should the AI Specialist recommend to the sales team?
options: Find Similar Deals.
Create Close Plan.
Create Account Plan.
explanation: Create Close Plan es la funcion de Einstein for Sales que genera planes con orientacion y pasos especificos para cerrar una oportunidad. Find Similar Deals busca deals parecidos y Create Account Plan es para estrategias de cuenta, no para guias de cierre.

question: Universal Containers’ Agent Action includes several Apex classes for the new Agentforce Agent. What is an important consideration when deploying Apex that is invoked by an Agent Action?
options: Apex classes invoked by an Agent Action may be deployed with less than 75% test coverage as long as the agent is not activated in production.
The Apex classes must have at least 75% code coverage from unit tests, and all dependencies must be in the deployment package.
The Apex classes may bypass the 75% code coverage requirement as long as they are only used by the agent.
explanation: Apex invocado por Agent Action requiere 75% cobertura y todas las dependencias en despliegue.

question: What is the importance of Action Instructions when creating a custom Agent action?
options: Action Instructions determine the data inputs and outputs of the action.
Action Instructions set the security permissions for who can execute the action.
Action Instructions define the expected user experience of an action.
explanation: Las Action Instructions definen la experiencia esperada del usuario al interactuar con la accion, guiando al LLM sobre cuando y como seleccionar y ejecutar la accion. Son el parametro mas critico para el comportamiento correcto del agente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to ensure the effectiveness, reliability, and trust of its agents prior to deploying them in production. UC would like to efficiently test a large and repeatable number of utterances. What should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Deploy the agent in a QA sandbox environment and review the Utterance Analysis reports.
Create a CSV file with UC's test cases in Agentforce Testing Center using the testing template.
Leverage the Agent Large Language Model (LLM) UI and test with different utterances.
explanation: Crear un archivo CSV con casos de prueba en Agentforce Testing Center usando la plantilla de testing es el metodo mas eficiente para pruebas repetibles a gran escala. Permite automatizar la validacion de multiples utterances sin consumir Einstein Requests.

question: Universal Containers built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
explanation: Los tokens varían por registro, por eso el error es aleatorio.

question: Universal Containers deploys a new Agentforce Service Agent into the company's website but is getting feedback that the Agentforce Service Agent is not providing answers to customer questions that are found in the company's Salesforce Knowledge articles. What is the most likely cause?
options: The Agentforce Service Agent user was not given the Allow View Knowledge permission set.
The Knowledge articles are not published in the correct language.
The Data Library was not connected to the correct Experience Cloud site.
explanation: La causa mas probable es que el usuario del Agentforce Service Agent no tenga el permission set Allow View Knowledge. Sin este permiso, el agente no puede acceder ni recuperar articulos de Knowledge para responder preguntas.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the related list.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference a custom related list.
explanation: Use merge fields para referenciar el related list predeterminado de oportunidades.

question: After a successful implementation of Agentforce Sales Agent with sales users, Universal Containers now aims to deploy it to the service team. Which key consideration should the Agentforce Specialist keep in mind for this deployment?
options: Assign the Agentforce for Service permission to the Service Cloud users.
Assign the standard service actions to Agentforce Service Agent.
Review and test standard and custom Agent topics and actions for Service Center use cases.
explanation: Al desplegar el agente al equipo de servicio, la consideracion clave es revisar y probar los topics y acciones estandar y personalizados para los casos de uso del Service Center. Los topics y acciones disenados para ventas pueden no ser apropiados o suficientes para los flujos de trabajo de servicio.

question: Universal Containers needs to bring individual customer warranties from an external system into Data Cloud. They want Agentforce to return warranty-related responses only for accounts whose warranty status is active. Which search approach should the Agentforce Specialist configure?
options: Depend on Agentforce instructions to enforce warranty constraints and include only WarrantyStatus = Active results.
Store the account's warranty status in an Agentforce custom variable to dynamically filter warranties during retrieval.
Use Hybrid Search and apply pre-filtering in a new custom retriever for matching accounts where the WarrantyStatus = Active field.
explanation: Usar Hybrid Search con pre-filtering en un retriever personalizado para WarrantyStatus = Active garantiza que solo se recuperen garantias activas de forma determinista. Depender de instrucciones del agente no es suficientemente confiable para filtros de negocio criticos.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked to optimize a business process flow by assigning actions to agents within the Salesforce Agentforce Platform. What is the correct method for the Agentforce Specialist to assign actions to an Agent?
options: Assign the action to a Topic first on Action Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first in Agent Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first on the Agent Actions detail page.
explanation: El metodo correcto es asignar la accion a un Topic primero en Action Builder, donde se gestionan las asociaciones entre acciones y topics del agente.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants to cover a broad range of user phrasing when testing its FAQ agent. Which Testing Center feature meets that need?
options: AI-generated synthetic test utterances based on natural language variations
Uploading only a small set of manually written prompts
Relying on live customer logs to capture phrasing diversity after deployment
explanation: El Testing Center puede generar sinteticamente utterances de prueba basadas en variaciones de lenguaje natural usando IA, permitiendo cubrir una amplia diversidad de formas en que los usuarios podrian formular sus preguntas sin necesidad de escribirlas manualmente o esperar datos de produccion.

question: Universal Containers is rolling out a new generative AI initiative. Which Prompt Builder limitations should the Agentforce Specialist be aware of?
options: Rich text area fields are only supported in Flex template types.
Creations or updates to the prompt templates are not recorded in the Setup Audit Trail.
Custom objects are supported only for Flex template types.
explanation: Una limitacion importante de Prompt Builder es que las creaciones y actualizaciones de prompt templates no se registran en el Setup Audit Trail de Salesforce. Esto es relevante para organizaciones con requisitos estrictos de auditoria de cambios de configuracion.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is setting up a new org and needs to ensure that users can create and execute prompt templates. The specialist is unsure which roles are necessary. Which permission sets should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Data Cloud Admin for executing templates.
Data Cloud Admin for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager es el permission set para crear y administrar templates; Prompt Template User permite ejecutarlos. Asignar ambos garantiza que los usuarios puedan tanto crear como ejecutar prompt templates segun sus roles.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to improve the agent productivity in replying to customer chats. Which generative AI feature should help UC address this issue?
options: Case Summaries
Service Replies
Case Escalation
explanation: Service Replies genera respuestas sugeridas en tiempo real durante conversaciones de chat, mejorando directamente la productividad de los agentes al reducir el tiempo de escritura. Case Summaries resume el caso pero no ayuda con las respuestas en chat en tiempo real.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to leverage Generative AI Salesforce functionality to reduce Service Agent handling time by providing recommended replies based on the existing Knowledge articles. Which feature should UC implement?
options: Einstein Case Summaries.
Knowledge Replies.
Einstein Work Summaries.
explanation: Knowledge Replies proporciona respuestas recomendadas basadas en articulos de Knowledge existentes, reduciendo el tiempo que los agentes de servicio dedican a redactar respuestas a preguntas frecuentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has configured a data library and wants to restrict indexing of knowledge articles to articles which are only publicly available in their knowledge base. UC also wants the agent to link sources that the large language model (LLM) grounded its response on. Which settings should help UC with this?
options: In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article and select Show sources.
In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article. It is not possible to display articles that the LLM grounded its response in.
Use Data Categories to categorize publicly available articles to index. Sources are automatically displayed when knowledge articles are categorized as Public.
explanation: En la configuracion de la Data Library, bajo Knowledge Settings, se puede habilitar 'Use Public Knowledge Article' para restringir la indexacion a articulos publicos, y 'Show sources' para que el agente enlace las fuentes en las que el LLM baso su respuesta.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Generative AI Salesforce functionality to reduce Service Agent handling time by providing recommended replies based on the existing Knowledge articles. On which AI capability should UC train the service agents?
options: Service Replies
Case Replies
Knowledge Replies
explanation: Knowledge Replies es la capacidad de IA que proporciona respuestas recomendadas basadas en articulos de Knowledge existentes, reduciendo el tiempo de manejo de los agentes. Service Replies es un termino diferente y Case Replies no existe como feature estandar de Salesforce.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts is implementing Agentforce retrieval. Customers sometimes type ambiguous terms (for example, 'package' could mean vacation package or baggage). Which retrieval strategy best balances precision and contextual disambiguation?
options: Use hybrid search, which combines keyword matching for precision with semantic embeddings for context.
Use semantic search only, which captures intent but may struggle with ambiguous terms when no context is provided.
Use keyword search only, which prioritizes exact term matching but risks missing contextual meaning.
explanation: Hybrid search combina busqueda por keywords (precision para terminos exactos) con embeddings semanticos (contexto para desambiguacion), siendo la estrategia optima para terminos ambiguos. La busqueda semantica sola puede fallar con ambiguedad y la de keywords sola pierde el contexto semantico.

question: An Agentforce Specialist created a Field Generation prompt template. What should the Agentforce Specialist do to expose the template to the user?
options: Use a screen flow to associate the Field Generation prompt template.
Associate the template with the form field on the Lightning page.
Call a template using an autolaunched flow.
explanation: Para exponer un Field Generation prompt template al usuario, se debe asociar el template con el campo especifico en la Lightning page. Esto hace que aparezca el icono sparkle junto al campo, permitiendo al usuario generar contenido con IA directamente desde el registro.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to assess Salesforce's generative AI features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third-party large language models (LLMs). UC specifically wants: no data used for LLM training by third parties, no data retained outside of UC's Salesforce org, and the data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider. Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the Agentforce Specialist highlight?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: Zero-Data Retention Policy es la propiedad del Einstein Trust Layer que garantiza que ningun dato se use para entrenar modelos de terceros, que no se retenga fuera del org de Salesforce, y que el proveedor del LLM no pueda acceder a los datos enviados. Aborda directamente los tres requisitos de privacidad de UC.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to make a marketing newsletter and to directly use data from five unrelated objects (two standard and three custom) ina prompt template. How should UC accomplish this?
options: Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from five objects.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object.
Create a flex template and use the five objects as inputs.
explanation: Use un flow disparado por plantilla para obtener datos de múltiples objetos.

question: How does an Agent respond when it can't understand the request or find any requested information?
options: With a general message asking the user to rephrase the request.
By escalating the conversation to a human agent automatically.
By returning an error message and closing the conversation.
explanation: Cuando el agente no puede entender la solicitud o no encuentra informacion relevante, responde con un mensaje general pidiendo al usuario que reformule su solicitud. Esto mantiene la conversacion activa y guia al usuario hacia una solicitud mas clara.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is implementing Agentforce Service Agent on Email. UC wants to understand what Einstein considers when generating Work Summaries. What does Einstein consider when generating a Work Summary?
options: Generation is grounded with conversation context, Knowledge articles, and cases.
Generation is grounded with existing conversation context only.
Generation is grounded with conversation context and Knowledge articles.
explanation: Einstein Work Summary usa el contexto de la conversacion actual y los articulos de Knowledge como grounding para generar el resumen. No incluye otros casos en el grounding; combina el historial de la conversacion con el conocimiento aprobado de la organizacion para crear un resumen preciso.

question: Which configuration must an Agentforce Specialist complete for users to access generative AI-enabled fields in the Salesforce mobile app?
options: Enable Mobile Generative AI.
Enable Mobile Prompt Responses.
Enable Dynamic Forms on Mobile.
explanation: Para que los campos generados por IA (Field Generation) sean accesibles en la app movil de Salesforce, se debe habilitar Dynamic Forms on Mobile. Sin esta configuracion, el icono sparkle de generacion de campo no aparece en la version movil.

question: During configuration, Universal Containers (UC) forgot to grant Knowledge access to the Agentforce Service Agent. Which permission must UC add for the agent to interact with Knowledge articles and answer customer questions effectively?
options: Allow View Knowledge and Run Flows
Access Knowledge records and fields, and Allow View Knowledge
Access Custom Objects and Manage External Users
explanation: Para que el agente pueda interactuar con articulos de Knowledge, necesita tanto 'Access Knowledge records and fields' (acceso de lectura a los registros y campos de Knowledge) como 'Allow View Knowledge' (permiso para ver la base de conocimiento). Ambos son necesarios para una interaccion completa con Knowledge.

question: Universal Containers has a strict change management process that requires all possible configuration to be completed in a sandbox which will be deployed to production. The Agentforce Specialist is tasked with setting up Work Summaries for Enhanced Messaging. Einstein Generative AI is already enabled in production. Which configuration steps should the Agentforce Specialist take in the sandbox that can be deployed to production?
options: Create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; add the Wrap Up component to the Messaging Session record page layout; and create Permission Set Assignments for the intended Agents.

From the Einstein setup menu, select Turn on Einstein; create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; and add the wrap up component to the Messaging session record page layout.
Create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; and add the Wrap Up component to the Messaging session record page layout.
explanation: Los pasos configurables en sandbox para Work Summaries son: crear campos personalizados para Issue, Resolution y Summary; crear una Quick Action que actualice esos campos; y agregar el componente Wrap Up al page layout de Messaging Session. Permission Set Assignments y la activacion de Einstein no se pueden desplegar via change set.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to limit an agent's access to Knowledge articles while deploying Answer Questions with Knowledge action. How should UC achieve this?
options: Create separate Data Libraries for each category of Knowledge articles.
Use profile-based permissions to restrict Knowledge article visibility.
Assign Data Categories to Knowledge articles and define Data Category filters in the Agentforce Data Library.
explanation: Asignar Data Categories a los articulos de Knowledge y definir filtros de Data Category en la Agentforce Data Library es el metodo correcto para limitar el acceso del agente a articulos especificos, garantizando que solo se recuperen articulos relevantes y autorizados.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in understanding intent and executing an Agent Action?
options: Determine a user's topic access and sort actions by priority to be executed
Identify the best matching topic and actions and correct order of execution
Find similar requested topics and provide the actions that need to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica el topic y la acción correcta en base a la intención del usuario, y ordena los pasos para ejecutar la respuesta adecuada.

question: A service manager wants to use Salesforce Prompt Builder to help agents summarize customer case notes after a support call. The summary should: capture the customer's issue, troubleshooting steps taken, and next actions; be no longer than five sentences; use plain language; and if no next action is identified, explicitly state 'No next action required.' Which prompt template follows Salesforce prompt design best practices?
options: Role: You are an experienced support agent. Task: Summarize the case notes. Context: Include customer issue, troubleshooting steps, and next actions. Constraints: Limit to 5 sentences, use plain language, and if no next action is found, state 'No next action required.' Format: Use numbered sentences for clarity.

Role: You are a support agent writing a case summary. Task: Provide a professional summary. Context: Include customer issue, steps taken, and next actions if available. Constraints: No strict sentence limit, but use plain language. If no next action is found, leave it out. Format: Use paragraphs.

Role: You are a case documentation assistant. Task: Write a summary of the support call. Context: Always describe the customer issue, troubleshooting, and resolution details. Constraints: The summary should be comprehensive and professional, but there is no limit on length or language style.
explanation: La opcion A sigue las mejores practicas de diseno de prompts de Salesforce: define claramente el rol, la tarea, el contexto, las restricciones especificas (limite de oraciones, lenguaje sencillo, manejo del caso sin accion), y el formato. Las otras opciones tienen restricciones vagas o incompletas que no garantizan la calidad del output.

question: Where should the Agentforce Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a copilot?
options: Copilot Actions page, the record page for the copilot action, or the Copilot Action Library tab
Copilot Actions page or Global Actions
Copilot Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the copilot action
explanation: Para agregar o actualizar acciones de un copilot, el Agentforce Specialist debe ir a la pagina de Copilot Actions, al record page de la accion especifica, o a la pestana Copilot Action Library. Estas tres ubicaciones permiten gestionar las acciones asignadas al agente.

question: An Agentforce Specialist builds a new Service Agent that uses a custom action built on a flow. The agent has been tested in a sandbox and is now ready to deploy. What is a key consideration regarding the activation status of the agent in the production environment?
options: The agent will be activated automatically only if the flow is also active.
The agent must be manually activated in production, regardless of its status in the sandbox.
The agent will automatically be activated upon successful deployment.
explanation: Los agentes deben activarse manualmente en produccion independientemente de su estado en el sandbox. El despliegue no activa automaticamente el agente; el Agentforce Specialist debe ir a produccion y activarlo explicitamente despues del despliegue exitoso.

question: Universal Containers aims to streamline the sales team's daily tasks by using AI. When considering these new workflows, which improvement requires the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Populate an AI-generated time-to-close estimation to opportunities
Populate an AI-generated summary field for sales contracts.
Populate an AI-generated lead score for new leads.
explanation: Poblar un campo de resumen generado por IA para contratos de ventas requiere Prompt Builder con un Field Generation template. Time-to-close y lead score son predicciones que usan modelos predictivos de Einstein, no Prompt Builder.

question: Universal Containers wants to automatically populate the Description field on the Account object with AI-generated content. Which prompt template type should be used?
options: Sales Email
Flex
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de template correcto para poblar automaticamente un campo especifico (Description) en un objeto (Account) con contenido generado por IA. Esta disenado exactamente para este caso de uso: generar contenido para campos individuales de registros de Salesforce.

question: Universal Containers plans to enhance its sales team's productivity using AI. Which specific use case is best suited for Prompt Builder?
options: Creating a draft newsletter for an upcoming tradeshow.
Automatically syncing leads from an external CRM.
Generating real-time dashboards from Salesforce reports.
explanation: Crear un borrador de newsletter para un proximo tradeshow es el caso de uso mas adecuado para Prompt Builder, ya que implica generar contenido de texto personalizado usando datos del CRM y un LLM. Las otras opciones no son casos de uso de generacion de contenido con IA.

question: What is the main benefit of using a Knowledge article in an Agentforce Data Library?
options: It provides a structured, searchable repository of approved documents so the agent can retrieve reliable information for each inquiry.
Only the retriever for Knowledge articles allows agents to access Knowledge from both inside the platform and on a customer's website.
The retriever for Knowledge articles has better accuracy and performance than the default retriever.
explanation: Knowledge articles ofrecen repositorio estructurado y confiable para retrieval.

question: A data science team has trained an XGBoost classification model for product recommendations on Databricks. The Agentforce Specialist is tasked with bringing inferences for product recommendations from this model into Data Cloud as a stand-alone DMO. How should the Agentforce Specialist set this up?
options: Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Einstein Studio, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using a Python SDK connector.
explanation: Para integrar un modelo de Databricks en Data Cloud, primero se debe crear el serving endpoint en Databricks donde esta hospedado el modelo, y luego configurar la conexion al modelo en Salesforce usando Model Builder. Einstein Studio no puede crear endpoints en plataformas externas.

question: A sales manager needs to contact leads at scale with hyper-relevant solutions and customized communications in the most efficient manner possible. Which Salesforce solution best suits this need?
options: Einstein Sales Assistant
Prompt Builder
Einstein Lead follow-up
explanation: Einstein Sales Assistant ofrece capacidades de outreach a escala con mensajes personalizados y recomendaciones para leads. Es la solución adecuada para el caso de uso de contactación masiva.

question: Universal Containers has a new AI project. What should an Agentforce Specialist consider when adding a related list on the Account object to be used in the prompt template?
options: After selecting a related list from the Account, use the field picker to choose merge fields in Prompt Builder.
Prompt Builder must be used to assign the fields from the related list as a JSON format.
The fields for the related list are based on the default page layout of the Account for the current user.
explanation: Al agregar una related list del objeto Account en un prompt template, los campos disponibles como merge fields estan basados en el page layout predeterminado del Account para el usuario actual. Si el campo no esta en el page layout, no aparecera como opcion de merge field en Prompt Builder.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is assisting Universal Containers with troubleshooting an agent. The Agentforce Specialist notices that the agent is not using topic actions in the desired sequence, causing inconsistent outcomes. Which technique should the Agentforce Specialist recommend to ensure deterministic control over the order in which actions are executed?
options: Specify the large language model (LLM) provider and version.
Specify custom variables and filters.
Specify the order of actions.
explanation: Para asegurar control deterministico sobre el orden de ejecucion de acciones, se deben usar variables personalizadas y filtros condicionales. Los filtros en las acciones garantizan que cada accion solo se ejecute cuando las condiciones previas se cumplan, creando una secuencia determinista independiente del razonamiento del LLM.

question: Universal Containers has a requirement to provide a sales summary for its sales reps who are using Employee Agents, but they are not happy with the default answer. Which best practice should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Record Summary custom prompt template.
Create a Knowledge Answer custom prompt template.
Update the standard record summary action.
explanation: La mejor practica cuando el resumen estandar no cumple los requisitos es crear un Record Summary prompt template personalizado. Esto permite controlar completamente el contenido, formato y grounding del resumen sin modificar el comportamiento estandar del sistema.

question: Universal Containers (UC) implements a custom retriever to improve the accuracy of AI-generated responses. UC notices that the retriever is returning too many irrelevant results, making the responses less useful. What should UC do to ensure only relevant data is retrieved?
options: Define filters to narrow the search results based on specific conditions.
Change the search index to a different data model object (DMO).
Increase the maximum number of results returned to capture a broader dataset.
explanation: Defina filtros para restringir los resultados a datos relevantes.

question: What considerations should an Agentforce Specialist be aware of when using Record Snapshots grounding in a prompt template?
options: Activities such as tasks and events are excluded.
Email addresses associated with the object are excluded.
Empty data, such as fields without values or sections without limits, is filtered out.
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra datos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores. Esto asegura que el grounding sea relevante y sin ruido para el modelo generativo.

question: Which part of the Einstein Trust Layer architecture leverages an organization's own data within a large language model (LLM) prompt to confidently return relevant and accurate responses?
options: Prompt Defense
Data Masking
Dynamic Grounding
explanation: Dynamic Grounding es la parte del Einstein Trust Layer que incorpora datos propios de la organizacion dentro del prompt del LLM para retornar respuestas relevantes y precisas. Prompt Defense protege contra ataques y Data Masking oculta datos sensibles, pero ninguno enriquece el prompt con datos del CRM.

question: How does the AI retriever function within Data Cloud?
options: It automatically extracts and reformats raw data from diverse sources into standardized datasets for use in historical trend analysis and forecasting.
It monitors and aggregates data quality metrics across various data pipelines to ensure only high-integrity data is used for strategic decision-making.
It performs contextual searches over an indexed repository to quickly fetch the most relevant documents, enabling grounding AI responses with trustworthy, verifiable information.
explanation: El retriever hace búsquedas contextuales sobre datos indexados en Data Cloud para traer documentos grounded. Es la pieza clave para entregar información verificable a la IA.

question: A developer is using the Salesforce CLI to deploy agent components from a sandbox to production. They recently made changes to several topics, instructions, and actions. Which metadata component should the developer include in their package.xml file that contains all of the topics and actions an agent will interact with?
options: genAiPlannerBundle
EinsteinAiPlannerBundle
BotBundle
explanation: genAiPlannerBundle es el componente de metadatos que contiene todos los topics y acciones con los que interactua un agente de Agentforce. Es el paquete correcto a incluir en el package.xml cuando se despliegan cambios a topics, instrucciones y acciones del agente via Salesforce CLI.

question: Universal Containers would like to route a service agent conversation to a human agent queue. Which tool connects the service agent to the human agent queue for escalation?
options: Screen Flow
Prompt Flow
Outbound Omni-Channel Flow
explanation: Outbound Omni-Channel Flow conecta el chat con cola de agentes humanos.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is discussing its AI strategy in an agile Scrum meeting. Which business requirement would lead an Agentforce Specialist to recommend connecting to an external foundational model via Einstein Studio (Model Builder)?
options: UC wants to fine-tune model temperature.
UC wants a model fine-tuned using company data.
UC wants to change the frequency penalty of the model.
explanation: Conectar un modelo externo via Model Builder es apropiado cuando UC quiere usar un modelo fine-tuneado con datos propios de la empresa, que no esta disponible en los modelos estandar de Salesforce. Fine-tunar temperatura o frequency penalty se puede hacer con Model Playground sin necesidad de un modelo externo.

question: Universal Containers wants to systematically validate agent responses before deployment using a scalable testing process. Which Testing Center approach should the company implement?
options: Upload a structured CSV test template and run batch test cases in Testing Center.
Manually interact with the agent in Builder until responses seem correct.
Use pilot users in production to flag incorrect responses post-launch.
explanation: Cargar una plantilla CSV estructurada y ejecutar casos de prueba en lote en el Testing Center es el enfoque mas escalable y sistematico para validar respuestas del agente antes del despliegue. Permite probar cientos de utterances de forma automatica y repetible sin consumir Einstein Requests.

question: For an Agentforce Data Library that contains uploaded files, what occurs once it is created and configured?
options: The files are stored in Salesforce Files and indexed on demand.
Indexes the uploaded files into Data Cloud.
The files are vectorized and stored in an external vector database.
explanation: Una vez que se crea y configura una Data Library con archivos subidos, Salesforce indexa automaticamente esos archivos en Data Cloud, creando los vectores y el search index necesarios para que el retriever pueda realizar busquedas semanticas sobre el contenido.

question: Universal Containers has a custom Agent action calling a flow to retrieve the real-time status of an order from the order fulfillment system. What should the Agentforce Specialist consider about the running user's data access?
options: The flow must have the 'with sharing' permission selected in the advanced settings for the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings to be respected.

The custom action adheres to the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings configured in the flow. The Agent will always run flows in system mode so the running user's data access will not affect the data returned.
explanation: Los agentes siempre ejecutan flows en system mode, lo que significa que los permisos, FLS y configuracion de sharing del flow se aplican independientemente del usuario en ejecucion. El acceso a datos del usuario no afecta los datos retornados cuando el agente invoca un flow.
